title: matthiola oxyceras var. livida
intro: Matthiola oxyceras var. livida, also known as the 'Shining Stock' or ' Stock', is a flowering plant species in the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Matthiola oxyceras var. livida include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, ointments, and salves, often in combination with other herbs like calendula and aloe vera.
